title: RiNo Art District - Where Art Is Made
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2017/RiNo Art District - Where Art Is Made.mov
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] We are builders, makers, hoppers, doers from clunkers and junkers out of shards and clay.
[00:00:18.00] We shape and frame, sort and stir, each of us turning grime into gold.
[00:00:24.00] Against fence and lock, a door swings, a window opens, a sunflower reaches for a fresh day.
[00:00:36.00] Everything is always growing.
[00:00:41.00] Dirt dusts places not yet alive and in this gravel of possibility we honor the old and worn, the faded and frail.
[00:00:51.00] Know that good bones are worth holding.
[00:00:56.00] Deep against rock, trains, clack and roll.
[00:01:00.00] We press into paper, scissors and paint, splattered gathered, mixed with each ding-ding-ding solid freight floats our dreams and we clatter wide awake in dark, in light, in love and hope.
[00:01:17.00] The day opens, the sky widens, you are here.
[00:01:23.00] Hand in hand, arm in arm, each grip is a dare to you declared breathe.
[00:01:29.00] Work, sear and sculpt, sew and hold, paint and saw, mix and mingle, break rules, break ground, create yourself, your world, your now.
[00:01:44.00] On the bridges of progress we dance and dive, wonder, wander, taste and make.
[00:01:53.00] With each how and why and what next we dig in and reach out to build in the mind a step, a ladder, another sky.
[00:02:05.00] Let's scaffold the unknown in everything, promise.
